outputs.description: To set up the mirroring: Enable Fetching incidents
outputs.name: You can enable incident mirroring between Cortex XSOAR incidents and CTM360 CyberBlindspot corresponding events (available from Cortex XSOAR version 6.0.0).

outputs.description: In the Mirroring Direction integration parameter, select in which direction the incidents should be mirrored:
outputs.name: in your instance configuration.

outputs.description: Description None Turns off incident mirroring.
outputs.name: Option

outputs.description: Any changes in CTM360 CyberBlindspot events (mirroring incoming fields) will be reflected in Cortex XSOAR incidents. Outgoing Any changes in Cortex XSOAR incidents will be reflected in CTM360 CyberBlindspot events (outgoing mirrored fields).
outputs.name: Incoming

outputs.description: Changes in Cortex XSOAR incidents and CTM360 CyberBlindspot events will be reflected in both directions. Newly fetched incidents will be mirrored in the chosen direction. However, this selection does not affect existing incidents. Important Note:
outputs.name: Incoming And Outgoing

outputs.description: Edit this page Report an Issue Previous
outputs.name: To ensure the mirroring works as expected, mappers are required, both for incoming and outgoing, to map the expected fields in Cortex XSOAR and CTM360 CyberBlindspot.
